failures.description: The agent made an invalid tool invocation by calling ProductCatalogSearch with missing and incorrectly typed arguments.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The required item_id and product_id were already available at index 1. At index 2, the Researcher attempted a concrete ProductCatalogSearch call but supplied malformed arguments: product_id was the integer 0 instead of the string "1656367028", and item_id "1151293680" was omitted. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3. This was not resolved later.
